context: ABCD test: find cheapest model that correctly handles factual questions. This proves the 'best deal' claim. Task class: factual/simple. Uses auth_bypass mode (no real API key) to test routing logic, or live mode if SOLACE_API_KEY is set.

abcd_config.description: Simple factual question — should any model handle this correctly
abcd_config.test_prompt: What is 2 + 2? Reply with the number only.
abcd_config.auth_check_notes: If SOLACE_API_KEY not set, run in auth_check_mode: verify all 4 models return 401 without auth. This confirms auth layer is consistent across all routing paths.

expected_outcome: Winner = Model A (Llama-70B) for factual tasks. 88% cheaper than GPT-4o. Proves 'best deal' routing.
